content.en:
"Where to go?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Shenyin Territory!"

True Yang Saint Ancestor Dao.

Shenyin Territory?

Ye Tian hadn't heard of it, but it was normal, after all, there were too many space-time territories, and many of them were not famous.

I saw that the True Yang Holy Ancestor took Ye Tian to teleport a few times and came to a place called the Fire Spirit Territory.

"Endless Ancestor, we tear through the space-time barriers of the Fire Spirit Territory and enter the Void Region. True Yang Saint Ancestor said.

"Why?"

Ye Tian was a little puzzled.

The True Yang Holy Ancestor explained, "Because the Divine Sound Territory does not have any space-time passages, it is impossible to enter the Divine Sound Territory through the space-time passages, and must fly through the Void Realm. The Divine Sound Territory is a space-time territory that belongs entirely to our Eight Poles Tower, and it is also one of our benefits. Many Eternal Realms wanted to snatch this "two-two-three" space-time territory, but they were forcibly suppressed by many of the Immortal Realm territories that we had walked out of the Eight Pole Tower. Otherwise, such a space-time territory would not be able to take our turn to the Eight Poles. "

Ye Tian was full of curiosity about the Shenyin Territory, could it be that there was some amazing chance in this?

However, he didn't ask too much, and when he entered the Shenyin territory, he would know what the situation was.

Ye Tian and the True Yang Holy Ancestor tore apart the space-time barrier of the Fire Spirit Territory and broke into the Void Territory.

As soon as you enter the Void Territory, you can't feel all the rules, but the rules in your body can still be used, and your strength is not much weaker, but you can't fight here for a long time, and it's difficult to recover.

Because in the Void Territory, it is difficult to use the origin power of the Source Sea.

And the void realm is full of nothingness, silence, darkness, suffocation, despair, all kinds of negative emotions come to my heart.

If an ordinary Supreme dared to enter the Void Territory, he was afraid that he would go crazy, but Ye Tian and the True Yang Holy Ancestor had a very strong will, so they didn't care about the environment here.

Wow!

They flew in the void area at an extremely fast speed, occasionally seeing a glimmer of light, that was a space-time territory, and there was a huge light source in the extreme distance, but the light of the light source could not extend too far, if it were not for Ye Tian's strength, he would not be able to perceive the existence of this huge light source.

This huge light source is the source sea!

Soon, they flew to the location of a faint light source, and their perception slowly became infinitely vast, and they sensed a space-time territory, that is, the territory of divine sound.

"Let's go inside!"

The True Yang Holy Ancestor casually tore through the space-time barrier of the Divine Sound Territory and entered the Divine Sound Territory. At the moment when he entered the territory of Shenyin, dozens of wills came across the void, spying on the arrival of the two. "These are the members of the other Eight Pole Towers, don't worry!"

True Yang Saint Ancestor introduced.

Ye Tian nodded, he didn't perceive the malice, so he wouldn't care.

All of a sudden, those wills retreated.

Now.

Ye Tian was feeling the difference in the territory of the divine sound, this territory was filled with a strange sound, this sound was like a whisper, and it was like a kind of singing, a mysterious voice composed entirely of the rules of a sound.

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and felt the mystery of this sound.

The strange power of the sound seeped into his body, as if it was difficult to stop the invasion of this sound.

Soon, he felt a little uncomfortable.

At first, he still wanted to resist this power and repair his hidden wounds.

But then, he suddenly noticed that something was wrong, and immediately looked surprised.

"Hahaha, Endless Ancestor, have you discovered the benefits of the Divine Sound Territory?" said the True Yang Saint Ancestor with a smile.

Ye Tian nodded, and said: "The Divine Sound Territory can allow us to perceive the flaws of the Eternal Body, no, it should not be said that it is a defect, but to perceive a more perfect place, and the sound of the Divine Sound Territory will stimulate our Eternal Body, under this stimulation and resistance, we will improve the Eternal Body step by step, and even find a way to transcendence." "

"That's right!" True Yang Saint Ancestor said, "The Divine Sound Territory is a treasure land that allows the Eternal Body to complete its detachment, even if it is already a transcendent Body, it can also be perfected here to become stronger, so many members of the Eight Pole Floor will regard this place as a place to cultivate." And the Endless Ancestor, your eternal body has not yet transcended, and this is the right place for you to cultivate. Compared to the other members of the Eight Poles, you will be able to get a real promotion here. "

"Thank you True Yang Holy Ancestor for bringing me here!"

Ye Tian thanked.

True Yang Saint Ancestor waved his hand and said, "No thanks, this is a place where every member of the Eight Poles Building can come, even if I don't bring you here, it won't be long before you know this place... Next, you can find a place to cultivate in the Divine Sound Territory, and I hope you will raise the Eternal Body to the transcendent realm as soon as possible. "

"I also hope that I can break through as soon as possible!"

Ye Tian said expectantly.

Soon, the True Yang Saint Ancestor left here, after all, the True Yang Saint Ancestor's eternal body had already transcended, and he didn't know how long he had been cultivating here, so this place was of little help to him.

After the True Yang Holy Ancestor left, Ye Tian found a mountain peak at random, placed a palace, and began to cultivate in the palace.

If the copy body raises the eternal body to the transcendent realm, it will not be long before the main body can copy it and cultivate the eternal body to the transcendent realm.

As the divine sound of the Divine Sound Territory entered the body, the flaws of Ye Tian's Endless Eternal Body were reflected one by one.

Maybe in Ye Tian's eyes, these are not defects, but the performance of perfection to the extreme, but in the process of resisting the divine sound, the performance in these places is not perfect, that is, it will not work.

That's why there's transcendence.

Detachment and detachment, transcendence of perfection, and creation of a more perfect eternal body is the realm of detachment.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian gradually comprehended the meaning of the transcendence of the Endless Eternal Body, but if he wanted to truly complete the transcendence, 3.1 was afraid that it would take a long time, and it would not be possible to complete it in a little time.

Meanwhile.

Ye Tian's body was also constantly compressing the half-step eternal power, perfecting the stacking secret technique.

Before you know it, ten eternal years have passed.

For Ye Tian, ten eternal years is also a very long time.

On this day, Ye Tian finally raised the Endless Eternal Body to the transcendent realm with the help of the Divine Sound Territory.

As soon as the Endless Eternal Body broke through the transcendent realm, the strength of his body skyrocketed many times, and Ye Tian's strength also skyrocketed.

And in these ten eternal years, Ye Tian perfected the stacking secret technique to a sixty-five fold level, and compressed the half-step eternal power to a twenty-fold level.

Now, his overall strength is much stronger than in the past, and it is no longer comparable to the Eight Extremes Realm that he has just been promoted. _
